name: Oracle 19c Installation Survey
description: SID e senhas sao obrigatorios. LV sizes, memoria %, patches e listener tem defaults - ajuste para seu ambiente. Patches fixos (dba_jobs/oradism/opatch) estao hardcoded no role.

spec.question_description: Database SID and name. Defines base directory (/oracle/<SID>) and main LV name (lv_<sid>). Max 8 chars.
Senha do superusuario SYS. Obrigatorio - nunca usar default em producao.
Senha do usuario SYSTEM. Obrigatorio - nunca usar default em producao.
Raw block device to initialize as PV and create the VG on (e.g. /dev/sdb, /dev/sdc). Leave empty if VG already exists on the target. WARNING: device will be wiped with pvcreate.
LVM Volume Group name for all Oracle LVs. Created automatically on oracle_data_disk if VG does not exist.
Size of the main Oracle base LV (named lv_<SID>, e.g. lv_awor). Holds Oracle home, software staging, admin dirs. Format: e.g. 60G
Size of the Oracle datafiles LV. Format: e.g. 10G
Size of the archive log LV. Format: e.g. 5G
Size of the undo tablespace LV. Format: e.g. 5G
Size of the temp tablespace LV. Format: e.g. 5G
Size for each mirrored redo log LV (A and B use the same size). Format: e.g. 1G
Size for each original redo log LV (A and B use the same size). Format: e.g. 1G
Percentage of total VM RAM to allocate for the Oracle SGA. Example: 40 = 40% of RAM. Recommended: 40-60%.
Percentage of total VM RAM to allocate for the Oracle PGA. Example: 20 = 20% of RAM. Recommended: 10-30%.
TCP port for the Oracle listener. Default 1521 is the industry standard. Change only if the port is already in use on the target VM.
Oracle database character set. AL32UTF8 is recommended for new deployments (supports all Unicode). WE8MSWIN1252 for legacy Windows compatibility.
Top-level directory of the Release Update bundle in /opt/patches on the AWX VM. Format: p<PatchID> (e.g. p37641958). Update quarterly when Oracle releases a new RU.
Subpath to the Release Update patch inside the bundle directory. Format: <BundleID>/<RU_ID> (e.g. 37641958/37642901). Used as -applyRU argument to runInstaller.
Subpath to the one-off patch inside the bundle directory. Format: <BundleID>/<Oneoff_ID> (e.g. 37641958/37643161). Used as -applyOneOffs to runInstaller. Leave EMPTY to skip -applyOneOffs.
Patch ID for the first post-installation patch (the version/release patch). Applied via opatch after runInstaller. Directory derived as p<ID>/<ID> under /opt/patches. Update quarterly.
Number of datafiles for TS_AUDIT_DAT01. Files named TS_AUDIT_DAT01_01.DBF, _02.DBF, etc.
Number of datafiles for TS_PERFSTAT_DAT01. Files named TS_PERFSTAT_DAT01_01.DBF, _02.DBF, etc.
Number of datafiles for the main data tablespace (TS_<SID>_DAT01). Files named TS_<SID>_DAT01_01.DBF, _02.DBF, etc.
Number of datafiles for the index tablespace (TS_<SID>_IDX01). Files named TS_<SID>_IDX01_01.DBF, _02.DBF, etc.
